raw_consumer_statement:
On XXXX XX/XX/year>, I got an email alert from XXXX. It was an spending alert in the amount of {$3300.00}. 
Since I didn't make this purchase I immediately called the home depot customer service which transferred me to citi card services. They disabled my cards and issued new cards. Also, they created a dispute for the above transaction and transferred it to their fraud/security team. 
On XXXX XX/XX/year>, I got an email from home depot about due bill amount of {$3300.00}. 
So I immediately called home depot credit card services. The customer representative told me that their security team has left a document on XXXX XXXX in my online home depot credit card account. 
The document states that the home depot credit card security team ha
s rejected the fraudulent/unauthorized charged claim. And I am responsible for those charges.

I am requesting you to please looking into this matter and provide help as this transaction was made by someone else in some other state. I did my due diligence of reporting the fraud immediately.
